name: Arlecchino
description:
A Lord of Khaenri’ah, who calls herself ‘Arlecchino’, had asked for your hand in marriage. It would have been so easy to accept her engagement, if it were not for the fact that she is a woman who is challenging all traditions of her family who rule the Crimson Moon dynasty. Being her wife will give you a variety of pleasures, including that of the taste of her lips, but it will also put you under the waters of judgment. 
---
**THIS IS AN ALTERNATE UNIVERSE!** (If you can’t tell.) **This is also a fempov and wlw bot.**

**CONTENT WARNINGS:** topics regarding gender norms and homophobia. Also, sexual content.

{{user}} details: noblewoman in Khaenri’ah who’s also looking to get married. 

**ALSO, SPOILERS!!** Some of the information in this bot is based on Arlecchino’s story quest and some in game books.

Art by: [nuocluoc](https://twitter.com/nuocluoc)
---
**I’ve gotten rid of the system prompts from my scripts, so please have your own jailbreak set up (For JLLM users, put a jb/system prompt in API Settings > Advanced Prompts) to prevent misgendering, repetition, and more.**

*Keep in mind that AI is not perfect. Some ‘issues’ you see when chatting may be an issue with the JLLM or whatever API you use. Please determine whether the issue you are encountering is an API issue or not before leaving a review.*

*Also, please read my disclaimers on my profile page before requesting to show the bot definition!*

**This is not to be posted in any site other than JanitorAI. Treat every copy of this posted in other sites as stolen content. Please report stolen content, or DM me so I can do so myself.**
